subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-20 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: In this day the greatness of the Cause is acknowledged by all the people, even the outsiders. This last time one of the Sardars of Persia
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @Greatest Name, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @unity; oneness of humanity
